description: Exported from brain YAML via brain build

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Company sector classification not determinable
Litigation history search returned no results
Market cap not computable (missing share count or price)
Employee count not found in 10-K or DEI tags
VIE/SPE status not determined from 10-K

threshold.clear: Diversified supplier base, no critical dependencies

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: 10-K segments section not extractable or single-segment filer
extraction_hints.validation_rule: at least one segment with revenue amount

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Geographic revenue breakdown not disclosed in 10-K
extraction_hints.validation_rule: regions sum to approximately total revenue

signals.name: Any Officer With Prior Litigation at Previous Company

threshold.triggered: Any officer has prior SCA involvement

signals.name: CEO or CFO With Prior Litigation

threshold.triggered: CEO or CFO has prior SCA involvement

signals.name: CFO Departure Coinciding With Stress Signals

threshold.triggered: CFO departure within 90 days of earnings miss, restatement, or stock drop

signals.name: Highest Individual Risk Score Exceeds Threshold

threshold.red: Going concern OR adverse opinion OR disclaimer

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Auditor report section not extractable from 10-K
extraction_hints.validation_rule: opinion is one of: unqualified, qualified, adverse, disclaimer

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Item 9A controls section not found in 10-K
extraction_hints.validation_rule: boolean flag for material weakness presence

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No 8-K Item 4.02 filings or restatement disclosures found

threshold.red: Auditor change with disagreement letter filed

signals.name: Failed Auditor Attestation on Internal Controls

threshold.red: Auditor unable to attest to internal control effectiveness under SOX 404
threshold.clear: Auditor attested to effective internal controls

threshold.red: Restatement within 90 days of significant stock decline creating class period exposure
>3 comment letters in 12 months OR accounting-focused letters

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: XBRL facts missing for current assets or current liabilities

threshold.red: Current ratio <1.0 OR WC declining >30% YoY
threshold.yellow: Current ratio <1.5 OR below sector median

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: XBRL facts missing for current assets or current liabilities
extraction_hints.validation_rule: value is positive or negative integer

threshold.red: Cash Ratio <0.2 OR OCF Ratio <0.4 OR Defensive Interval <30 days
threshold.yellow: Cash Ratio <0.5 OR OCF Ratio <0.8 OR CCC >sector 75th percentile

threshold.red: DETERIORATING: 3+ consecutive quarters declining in majority of metrics
Runway <12 months with no clear funding path
threshold.clear: Runway >18 months or company is cash flow positive

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Cash balance or operating cash flow missing from XBRL
Debt line items not found in XBRL balance sheet

threshold.red: Interest coverage <1.5x OR fixed charge coverage <1.0x
threshold.yellow: Interest coverage <2.5x OR below sector 25th percentile

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Interest expense or operating income not in XBRL income statement

threshold.red: >30% due within 24 months OR any material maturity <12 months
threshold.yellow: >20% due within 24 months OR maturity <24 months

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Debt maturity schedule not disclosed in 10-K notes
extraction_hints.validation_rule: at least one maturity year present

threshold.red: CCC/Caa or below OR downgraded in last 12 months
threshold.yellow: B rating OR negative outlook OR high yield
threshold.clear: BBB/Baa or above with stable/positive outlook

threshold.red: Breach/default OR <10% headroom OR multiple waivers
threshold.yellow: <20% headroom OR any waiver/amendment in 12 months

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: One or more forensic indicator inputs missing from XBRL

threshold.description: Both Beneish AND Dechow flag manipulation

signals.name: DSO and AR Divergence from Revenue

threshold.clear: AR growth aligned with revenue growth

threshold.red: Deferred revenue declining >20% while recognized revenue grows
threshold.yellow: Deferred revenue declining while recognized revenue grows

threshold.red: Revenue decline >20% OR 3 consecutive years declining

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Revenue line item not found in XBRL income statement

threshold.red: Margin compression >500bps OR below sector 25th percentile
threshold.yellow: Margin compression >200bps OR below sector median

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Margin components (gross profit, operating income) missing

threshold.red: GAAP negative while Adjusted positive, OR Adjusted exceeds 2x GAAP
threshold.yellow: GAAP/Adjusted gap exceeds 50%, OR swing to loss

threshold.red: >2 material earnings events in policy period
threshold.yellow: >0 material earnings events in policy period
>10% revenue at risk from contract expiration
threshold.red: >25% revenue at risk from contract expiration in policy period

threshold.yellow: Material regulatory decision in policy period
threshold.red: Binary regulatory decision with >10% revenue impact in policy period

threshold.yellow: Material litigation milestone in policy period
threshold.clear: No milestones or no active litigation
threshold.red: Trial date or class cert hearing in policy period with material exposure
Material M&A closing in policy period with integration risk

threshold.clear: On track or no synergy claims

threshold.red: Key customer loss disclosed or at risk
Key employee departures or mass attrition
Integration problems disclosed OR missed milestones
threshold.yellow: Integration in progress with disclosed challenges
threshold.clear: No pending integration or on track
Complaint volume at or below industry average

threshold.red: Adverse event spike >3x baseline OR safety signal identified
NHTSA investigation opened OR recall pending
threshold.yellow: Elevated complaint volume for specific issue

threshold.red: Active whistleblower complaint with regulatory engagement
DPO increasing >20 days YoY OR vendor complaints in news
Significant compliance hiring surge (>5 positions, senior level)
Current ratio <1.0 AND negative working capital AND declining revenue
threshold.yellow: Current ratio <1.0 OR negative working capital

threshold.red: Goodwill >50% of total assets AND market cap < book value
threshold.yellow: Goodwill >30% of total assets OR recent acquisition

threshold.red: Market cap < book value sustained >90 days
threshold.clear: Market cap well above book value

threshold.red: >3 active contract disputes OR material revenue at risk
Key customer departure confirmed OR >10% churn rate disclosed
Revenue recognition changes OR restatement risk
threshold.yellow: Aggressive revenue recognition noted by auditor

threshold.red: Gross margin declining >500bps AND operating leverage negative
Rating declining and below category average
Investigative piece published by major outlet
Mass job posting removal (>50% in 30 days)
>50% revenue from AI-related products with regulatory uncertainty

threshold.yellow: GPU supply risk disclosed in filings

threshold.red: Single data center dependency OR capacity constraints
>0 active proxy contests with dissident slate

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Board size not extractable from DEF 14A
DEF 14A not filed or board composition not parseable

threshold.red: CEO and Chair roles are combined (duality present)
threshold.clear: CEO and Chair roles are separated

threshold.red: >2 directors on 4+ boards OR CEO on 2+ outside boards
>3 departures in 18 months OR sudden resignation

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Board member prior litigation not searched — requires SCAC cross-reference for each director
extraction_hints.validation_rule: search performed for each board member

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Director qualifications not extracted from proxy bio
Board member character screening not performed — requires web search for personal history
extraction_hints.validation_rule: background screening completed for all directors

threshold.red: No succession plan AND CEO >65 OR tenured >15 years
<1 year CEO tenure OR no prior public company CEO experience

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: CEO identity or tenure not extractable from DEF 14A

threshold.red: CFO <6 months tenure OR no relevant financial background
threshold.clear: CFO >2 years tenure with CPA/relevant qualification

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: CFO identity or tenure not extractable from DEF 14A

threshold.red: Multiple key officers <6 months tenure OR GC vacancy
threshold.clear: All key officers >1 year tenure with relevant backgrounds

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Executive team data insufficient for stability assessment

threshold.red: Interim >6 months OR no succession plan disclosure
Founder with >50% voting control + no independent board majority
threshold.clear: Non-founder management OR founder with balanced governance

threshold.yellow: Specific executive(s) named as key dependency
threshold.red: Single key person dependency with no succession plan
threshold.clear: No key person dependency OR robust succession plan in place

threshold.red: >2 departures in same function within 18 months

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Executive character/conduct screening not performed — requires web search for personal history
extraction_hints.validation_rule: background screening completed for CEO, CFO, and key officers

threshold.red: Plan adopted/modified <30 days before material event
threshold.yellow: Plan adopted/modified <90 days before material event
threshold.clear: Plans adopted with adequate cooling period

threshold.red: Sales within 30 days before negative disclosure
threshold.yellow: Sales pattern deviates from historical norm

threshold.red: >25% of holdings sold in 90 days by C-suite
threshold.yellow: >10% of holdings sold in 90 days by C-suite

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: CEO compensation not disclosed in DEF 14A summary table

threshold.clear: CEO pay ratio at or below 200:1

threshold.red: No clawback policy beyond SOX minimum
threshold.clear: Robust clawback policy beyond SOX requirements
Golden parachute < 10000000 or no golden parachute

threshold.red: Dual-class with >50% voting control by insiders
Poison pill in effect OR multiple anti-takeover provisions
threshold.yellow: Poison pill on shelf OR 1-2 anti-takeover provisions

threshold.red: No proxy access AND no special meeting rights
threshold.yellow: Restrictive proxy access (>5% ownership, >3 year holding)
threshold.clear: Proxy access at 3%/3-year standard or better

threshold.red: Supermajority required for bylaw amendments AND board removal
No written consent AND no special meeting right
Special meeting rights denied or >25% threshold
Classified board with no declassification proposal

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: PSLRA safe harbor language not assessed
extraction_hints.validation_rule: text description of safe harbor usage

threshold.red: Multiple peers with active SCAs in same industry
threshold.yellow: 1 peer with active SCA in same industry
threshold.clear: No peer SCAs in recent period

signals.name: Financial Event / Stock Drop Class Period Windows

threshold.red: >2 correlated financial event / stock drop windows
threshold.clear: No correlated financial event / stock drop windows

threshold.red: Sector with high litigation frequency + company exposed

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Sector-specific regulatory databases not checked

threshold.red: >5 active product liability matters OR class action
>5 active employment matters OR class/collective action
>3 active IP matters OR patent troll targeting
>3 material contract disputes OR >10% revenue at risk
Active DOJ/FTC antitrust investigation OR class action
>2 active trade secret cases OR involving key technology
Qui tam or SEC whistleblower complaint filed
Material data breach disclosed OR breach litigation
>3 active foreign suits OR material foreign judgment
Active False Claims Act suit OR debarment risk
Prior SEC enforcement action in 5 years

threshold.yellow: EPA inquiry or notice of violation

threshold.red: FDA warning letter OR consent decree

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No state-level regulatory actions found
extraction_hints.validation_rule: each action has agency and description

threshold.red: Formal SEC investigation or Wells Notice

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No SEC enforcement actions found in AAER or litigation releases
extraction_hints.validation_rule: each action has date and action_type

threshold.red: >3 comment letters in 12 months OR re-opened correspondence

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Stanford SCAC returned no matches and 10-K Item 3 empty
extraction_hints.validation_rule: each case has filing_date and allegations

threshold.red: >0 active SCA with class period in policy window

threshold.yellow: Individual lead plaintiff with major law firm

threshold.red: >0 active SCA past motion to dismiss

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Litigation reserves not disclosed in 10-K notes

threshold.red: >0 active SCA filing within current policy period

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No derivative litigation found in court records or 10-K
extraction_hints.validation_rule: each case has filing_date and claim_type

threshold.clear: No M&A litigation or no pending M&A

threshold.yellow: 401k with company stock + recent stock decline
threshold.clear: No ERISA claim and minimal exposure

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Stanford SCAC search returned no results

threshold.red: >0 dismissals on narrow procedural grounds (refiling risk)

signals.name: New Risk Factors Added This Year

threshold.triggered: New risk factor explicitly mentioning litigation or securities claims
New risk factor mentioning regulatory investigation or enforcement
Whistleblower or qui tam language detected
Internal investigation or special committee language detected

signals.name: Filing Date Shifted Significantly vs Prior Year

threshold.display: Days difference vs prior year filing date

signals.name: Critical Audit Matters Changed From Prior Year

threshold.red: New CAM related to revenue recognition or litigation

threshold.display: YoY change in qualifying language frequency
YoY change in forward-looking statement frequency

threshold.red: Net selling >$1M in 90 days by multiple insiders

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No Form 4 filings found in lookback period
Insufficient Form 4 data to detect cluster patterns
extraction_hints.validation_rule: boolean flag for cluster selling detection

threshold.red: 3+ volume spikes (>2x 20-day avg) in trailing year

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: P/E ratio not computable (negative earnings or no price data)
extraction_hints.validation_rule: PE is positive number or N/A for unprofitable companies

threshold.detection: >15% single-day drop + company-specific trigger + peers dropped <5%
>20 days declining, no 5% recovery bounce, short interest rising
Company down vs peers: >15% at 30 days OR >20% at 90 days
3+ of: <$5 price, convertibles >20% mkt cap, shorts >2x sector, delisting warning, <12mo runway
2+ triggers: short seller report, short spike >50% MoM, drop >15% on report day, rebuttal, SEC/DOJ inquiry

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No price data for trailing 18 months

threshold.red: 90-day <-50% OR all horizons negative + worse than sector
Gap >20% at any horizon OR gap widening
Any drop >20% OR drop >10% with litigation filed

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: No daily price data available for drop event detection
extraction_hints.validation_rule: each event has date and drop_pct

threshold.red: NOT RECOVERING: <5% from low after 60+ days
Delisting notice OR price <$1 for 30+ consecutive days
threshold.yellow: Price <$2 or market cap below minimum

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Short interest data not available from market API

threshold.red: Short ratio >10 days OR increasing >50% QoQ
threshold.yellow: Short ratio >5 days OR increasing >25% QoQ

extraction_hints.no_data_sentinel: Historical short interest data not available
extraction_hints.validation_rule: trend direction is increasing, stable, or decreasing

threshold.yellow: Elevated short interest without identified report
